name: Transplant Claims
description: Validation of transplant pricing handled by Optum. Special handling for payments over $5K.

overpayment_conditions.optum_pricing_mismatch: One claim priced by Optum and the opposite claim (unpriced) is billed and hasn't expired.
overpayment_conditions.dual_optum_pricing: Both claims priced by 'transplant claims priced by Optum' (Should not be written).
overpayment_conditions.over_5k_sop: Payment exceeds $5K and does not follow the Transplant SOP.

explanation_templates.valid: Pricing aligns with Optum Transplant pricing guidelines or follows Transplant SOP for high-dollar claims.
explanation_templates.recovery: Opposite claim billed while one claim was correctly priced by Optum; recovery potential identified.
